code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Strong dissatisfaction or anger
    - Product is defective, unsafe, completely ineffective, or returned
    - Clear statements such as "terrible," "5" →5

    EDGE CASE HANDLING:
    - Mixed updates: Final positive conclusion dominates initial skepticism →5
    - Practical usage tips without dissatisfaction →5 ("works best when...")
    - Explicit recommendations for primary use case despite limitations for other uses →5
    - Specific-use praise + limitations for other uses →5 if intended for that specific use
    - Minor criticism + repeated purchase behavior →5
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "This vacuum spat debris back out immediately. Dangerous and completely useless."
Rating: 1

Example 2:
Review: "Lids crack easily and leak during transport. Not worth the price despite working occasionally."
Rating: 2

Example 3:
Review: "Does the job as basic storage but feels flimsy. Better than nothing for now."
Rating: 3

Example 4:
Review: "Vibrant blue transformed my kitchen! Material feels thin compared to premium brands but works flawlessly."
Rating: 4

Example 5:
Review: "With all the mixed opinions I had low expectations, but this blanket surpassed all! Soft, weighty, and durable despite initial doubts."
Rating: 5

Example 6:
Review: "I bought mainly for sending leftovers. Easier than losing expensive containers - will keep repurchasing!"
Rating: 5

Example 7:
Review: "Had these 1 day. Medium worked, large broke immediately when used as shown. Wouldn't recommend."
Rating: 2

Example 8:
Review: "These containers are perfect for meal prep. They're lightweight and stack well. Even if they're not oven-safe, they meet all my needs."
Rating: 5

Example 9:
Review: "Love these potholders! Plastic smell washed out completely. Performs excellently."
Rating: 5

Example 10:
Review: "Perfect for beginners! These knives aren't professional-grade but ideal for everyday use. Highly recommend!"
Rating:5
</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: MISSING

  *** WARNING: Categories 5 have NO rules in <DynamicRules>! ***
  *** You MUST add at least 2 rules for each missing category. ***

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (25 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 14
  gold 5 -> 4: 6
  gold 3 -> 4: 2
  gold 4 -> 3: 2
  gold 1 -> 2: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "I'm giving this three stars even though it worked perfectly for my needs but wouldn't for most people who are ordering it as the "guest hamper" it is described to be. It's small. Way too small to work as a hamper unless you wash a few items of clothi..."
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "Frankly I'm a bit at odds with these sheets but overall, ended up happy...with reservations. Growing up there was only one type of sheet...my mother, my grandmother and my great grandmother all swore by JC Penny percale sheets. Over the years I've tr..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "this everyday throw is soft and cuddly and will get lots of use from your family. They will be covering up in this throw because it is warm. It is also nice looking. The chevron pattern is up to date and the colors go with many decors. This throw is ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "I have only used this once so far, but I really like it. It is easy to operate once you figure out the steam buttons...lol! The scrubber was effective and it cleaned a pretty sticky kitchen floor. Next..on to my tile."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "I love this vacuum and ditto the other lovers reviews. It really does go under almost anything and is very handy.

.UPDATE after 2 yrs of  major problems which were rectified thru customer service I am giving up and moving on."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [2, 3, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "On my computer screen the color for the 'cool brown' bath mat is accurate.  It's a faded sort of brown with lots of gray tint to it.  Our upstairs bath is in browns -- golden-hue brown and tile brown-- and it fits in.

What you get is a cool-brown no..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "I bought this for vacations, not paying enough attention to the description. I thought it was just a fancier version of the small one that people buy for travel or if there is only one person using it. So when it got here I was a bit taken aback at h..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "It's a nice enough mug, but nothing special.  The lid isn't great.

I ended up using for camping, and it works fine there.  Mt park ranger cannot tell there's beer inside!"
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "This makes a nice easy way to buy a matched set of bags that includes reasonable versions of everything you need. They're not the best bags I've seen/had (there are a few spots where the stitching is a little off-kilter, and I don't love the material..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "There is only one problem for the experienced cook when it comes to this set - you're likely to already have one or more of these tools and possibly Oxo Good Grips at that! That's why I think this set is best suited for someone setting up a kitchen f..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 25 errors, 15 borderline out of 64 examples."}
